            print(f'{i:04d}: {line[:180]}')
    print()

We also have 8 additional ConvNeXt checkpoints that hurt as a logit ensemble, but may still help in weight space if selectively included; a greedy model soup using the balanced validation set is a plausible next step and relatively cheap compared with more training. Decision: create a greedy ConvNeXt soup candidate from all available same-architecture ConvNeXt checkpoints, save the best validation soup, and submit it.
